status_surfaces.finding: Mostly aligned; no first-class route for noncanonical archive.

status_surfaces.observed_state: GOV-001 through GOV-004 on main; PAR-001 task packets only on draft branch PR #20.
status_surfaces.finding: Workers must explicitly read PR #20 branch until merged.

findings.summary: trace/STAR_MAP.md is stale after GOV-004 merge.
findings.evidence: origin/main is 4afeb0c GOV-004, but STAR_MAP still reports accepted baseline af8c73a and active GOV-004 PR #11.
findings.recommendation: Run an authorized status-surface cleanup task.

findings.summary: Accepted evidence list omits GOV-003 and GOV-004 Light Curves.
findings.evidence: trace/evidence/GOV-003_LIGHT_CURVE.md and trace/evidence/GOV-004_LIGHT_CURVE.md exist on main but are absent from STAR_MAP accepted evidence.
findings.recommendation: Update accepted evidence list under authorized cleanup.

findings.summary: PAR-001 task packets are staged only on draft PR #20.
findings.evidence: origin/main trace/tasks contains GOV-001..GOV-004; PR #20 branch adds PAR/REPO/HERMES/ARCH packets.
findings.recommendation: Decide whether to merge PR #20 before worker launch or keep branch-specific packet reads.

findings.summary: Nested GOV-005/GOV-006 PR topology requires sequencing.
findings.evidence: PR #15 and PR #17 target codex/GOV-005-multi-agent-governance while PR #13 targets main.
architect/GOV-001-repository-bootstrap, audit/sprint-4-governed-hermes-baseline, and sprint/05-policy-engine are still remote heads.
findings.recommendation: Review branch-retention policy; do not delete without Product Owner authorization.

findings.summary: Primary local checkout contains out-of-scope GOV-005 untracked work.
findings.evidence: Main local checkout showed untracked policy/, tests/, and trace/evidence/ENSO-0005_LIGHT_CURVE.md.
findings.recommendation: Use isolated worktrees for all non-GOV-005 tasks.

findings.summary: No distinct archive route exists in CELESTIAL_INDEX.
findings.evidence: GOV-004 archive exists under archive/chatgpt-review-history, but CELESTIAL_INDEX has no archive-history area.
findings.recommendation: Add only if future tasks need first-class archive routing.

recommended_next_actions: Create an authorized status-surface cleanup task for trace/STAR_MAP.md.
Decide whether PR #20 should merge before launching parallel task workers.
Review historical branch retention under a separate branch-management task.
Keep runtime, Sprint 5, Hermes activation, and policy-engine work isolated until explicitly authorized.
